title.en: Therefore, the Saya Realm God nodded in underst...

content.en:
The Saya Realm God also knew that he had to pay some fees, otherwise why would the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace share the benefits with other forces?

Therefore, the Saya Realm God nodded in understanding.

Subsequently, the god of the Sumeru realm left.

And after the god of the Sumeru realm left, the god of the Saya realm sat on the throne, deep in thought, hesitating, not knowing how to choose.

But gradually, his expression became firm again.

"Maybe some sacrifices have to be made. "

He thought to himself.

But this matter is not something he can decide on his own, he has to discuss it with those high-level peak realm gods, if half of the high-level peak realm gods agree, then he will agree to the proposal of the Sumeru realm gods, let the high-level realm gods enter the treasure land of the Death Void, and risk their lives to find resources.

As long as you come back alive, it's worth it.

......

Another period of time passed.

Terran, the Endless Kingdoms Alliance.

The surrounding void twisted.

Ye 05 Tian stared at the figure that twisted the void in front of him, and he was almost about to make a move.

But the other party immediately said: "Ye Tianjie God, I am the Sumeru Realm God of Taihao Tianzhu Palace, and I am here to give benefits to the human race!"

The god of the Sumeru realm!

Ye Tian had heard of this peak realm god, one of the peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace, who possessed a special means and was able to freely move to any place in the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm.

Now, Ye Tian knew that this special method was not an Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, but an Extradimensional Technique.

He could sense a faint extradimensional power from his body.

But he can't create such an extra-dimensional technique, not because his comprehension is not enough, but because the attributes of extra-dimensional things are not suitable.

Extra-dimensional things like the Kun Realm Wood Fragment are not suitable for moves such as shifting and void distortion and transfer, while the Sumeru Realm God is an item that fuses the extradimensional power of space, so it can master such a means, and it can be teleported to any place in the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm in a single thought.

Of course.

The god of the Sumeru realm did not go to the main body, but sent his own one-thought will clone to a certain area.

"I've seen the gods of the Sumeru realm!"

Ye Tian said politely.

Immediately, he invited the god of the Sumeru realm to sit down.

After the Sumeru Realm God sat down, he spoke: "Ye Tianjie God, this time I came to prepare to give the human race a big opportunity, our Taihao Tianchao Palace found a treasure land in the Death Void, which is suitable for high-level peak realm gods, and your strength is much stronger than the ordinary high-level peak realm gods, it is very suitable to go there, and you can definitely get a lot of benefits." "

It stands to reason that the gods of the Sumeru realm are not looking down on the top forces of the ordinary, and the top forces of the human race, which only have a few high-level realm gods, were not included in his invitation.

But Ye Tian is more special, his combat power is much stronger than that of ordinary high-level peak realm gods, and he has a clone, it is said that there are many clones, and all of them have the strength of the body.

Such a special high-level realm god naturally has to be invited.

In case of getting benefits, it is also equivalent to Taihao Tianchao Palace getting benefits!

"Death Void, a treasure land?"

Ye Tian was excited in his heart.

He was about to enter the Void of Death, but he couldn't find a way!

Unexpectedly, Taihao Tianchao Palace came to invite him to enter a treasure land in the Death Void, although he also knew very well that Taihao Tianchao Palace would not be so kind, that treasure land must be extremely dangerous, and Taihao Tianchao Palace did not want to sacrifice the high-level realm gods in his own forces, so he invited him to join.

However, he didn't show his eagerness, but asked calmly, "Sumeru Realm God, that treasure land should be extremely dangerous, right?"

"It's indeed a bit dangerous, there are some extradimensional creatures there, maybe you don't know the probability of extradimensional creatures, but extradimensional creatures hardly care about high-level realm gods. Therefore, there would be danger for the peak realm god to enter, but there was no danger for the high-level realm god. The Sumeru Realm God explained.

"I want specific information, and if I don't know anything, I don't dare go in. "

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, the Sumeru Realm God gave Ye Tian the specific information.

The Sumeru Realm God thought that Ye Tian was afraid of that treasure land, but in fact, Ye Tian frowned slightly when he saw that the treasure land did not allow the peak realm gods who fused extradimensional things to enter.

Because both of his replica bodies are fused with extradimensional things, the Kun Realm Wood Fragment.

In other words, these two replica bodies could not enter the treasure land, and could only send the replica bodies that had not fused with extradimensional things.

If there were no extra-dimensional things, he would not be able to perform extra-dimensional techniques, and his combat effectiveness would naturally decline many times, and it was estimated that he could only be comparable to the weaker peak realm gods.

But soon, he calmed down. []

Even if it was only comparable to the weaker peak realm gods, it was much stronger than other high-level realm gods.

He is the realm god who has the greatest advantage and the most promising access to a large number of resources.

Moreover, he also has the opportunity to leave the Eternal Realm and enter the Void of Death.

This is his only chance to enter the Void of Death at the moment, and it must not be missed.

So, he hurriedly said: "Sumeru Realm God, I am willing to enter that treasure land, say, do you have any requirements?"

"There's no requirement, it's just that when you come out, you can hand over half of the resources you find on your body to our Taihao Tianchao Palace. The Sumeru Realm God smiled.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian agreed, and then 097 said: "If the resources consumed by healing or cultivation in that treasure land are not counted among them, right?"

"Of course it doesn't count!"

Sumeru realm Shinto.

But he didn't think that any high-level realm god would dare to cultivate inside that treasure land, there were dangers everywhere, and if he didn't come out in time to find a little treasure, he would probably die.

In that case, who would dare to practice for a long time!

Therefore, the little resources consumed are nothing at all, and Taihao Tianchao Palace will naturally not be so shameless, even counting this kind of consumed resources.

So, Ye Tian agreed to join.

The god of the Sumeru realm gave a contact information and a time to gather, and then moved away.

......

"Hahaha, there's finally a way to enter the Death Void, this time maybe it's my chance!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

this day.

It's time to gather.

Taihao Tianchao Palace will not come to pick him up, and he needs to go to the location where he gathers within the specified time.

So, he immediately set off from the Terran Endless Realm Alliance and went to a station at the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, which was also a stronghold of the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace at the realm of the Realm God Kingdom.
